summary: The diff implements all three requirements: backend currency preference (REQ-1), Settings screen currency selector (REQ-2), and app-wide currency formatting updates (REQ-3). Coverage is thorough across backend and frontend. One minor gap exists: AddExpense screen currency formatting is not explicitly shown in the diff, though expenseMapping.ts is updated.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update currency formatting in AddExpense screen
missing_requirements.reason: REQ-3 explicitly lists AddExpenseScreen as one of the components that must use the selected currency symbol/locale formatting. The diff shows updates to ExpenseList, TotalsCards, CategoryBreakdown, CalculatorScreen, and expenseMapping.ts, but AddExpenseScreen.tsx is only described as navigating to /expenses on success with no currency formatting update evidenced.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module (backend/migration.mo) for upgrading existing actor state
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for a currency preference field with get/set methods. A separate migration module was not requested but was added to handle schema upgrades from old to new actor state.
